---
kind: decision
id: bd-5e6af94f-1245-41cd-b0b0-c31f1e2836e8
pushedAt: "2026-06-22T11:15:55.675Z"
projectPath: /Users/thisisdhika/Projects/kaa.ltd/LAB/omp-noesis
metadata:
  rationale: "The existing preamble budget enforcement only drops entire sections after they're built. A per-section budget for graph evidence prevents a single verbose section from dominating the preamble. Adding findings incrementally (rather than building all then trimming) is deterministic, uses the existing estimateTokens utility, and is the simplest correct approach."
  source: inference
  alternatives: "Build full output then iteratively drop findings from the end — more complex and would need marking which lines belong to which finding., Char-based heuristic — but token estimation already exists and is the right tool."
  tags: "graph-query-budget, token-budget, graph-evidence, preamble"
---
Add CAPS.graphQueryTokenBudget = 500 and enforce it in buildGraphEvidence() by incrementally building findings and stopping when adding the next finding exceeds the budget.
